message:
test(mux): add preset name contract test for session handler compatibility (ft-1memj.29)

Validate that layout preset function names match the exact strings used by
the mux-server session handler's SetLayoutCycle name resolution. This
prevents silent breakage if preset names are changed without updating
the handler.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
